subcodes.first_line: O my God! I traveled through wildernesses and crossed seas until I reached the realm of light, where I became a resident at Thy threshold and sought shelter in Thy court
subcodes.first_line_orig: یزدان من بادیه پیمودم از دریا عبور نمودم تا باقلیم نور رسیدم مقیم درگاه شدم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
